policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aks-03 - Ensure that authorization and authentication use the AzureAD'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Kubernetes+Service#IncidentremediationKubernetesService-drcp-aks-03 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP AKS Local accounts disabled
policyDefinition.description: Disabling local authentication methods improves security by ensuring that Azure Kubernetes Service Clusters should exclusively require Azure Active Directory identities for authentication. Learn more at: https://aka.ms/aks-disable-local-accounts.

drcp.name: AKSDisableLocalAccounts
drcp.controlDesc: Ensure that authorization and authentication use Microsoft Entra ID

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
